summary: Iteration 63 Testing - Business Development (BD) Module. All backend APIs (18/18 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. BD login, student management, dashboard, redeposits, and reassignment all functional.
passed_tests: Backend: BD agent login (rashidha@clt-academy.com) returns role business_development
Backend: Super admin login (aqib@clt-academy.com) returns role super_admin
Backend: GET /api/bd/agents returns 2+ BD agents (Rashida, Farsana)
Backend: GET /api/bd/students returns 522 students for BD agent (round-robin assignment)
Backend: GET /api/bd/students returns 1044 students for super admin (all BD students)
Backend: GET /api/bd/students?bd_stage=new_student filters by stage correctly
Backend: GET /api/bd/students?search=X search functionality works
Backend: GET /api/bd/dashboard returns pipeline metrics (total_students, stage_counts, period_revenue, all_time_revenue)
Backend: GET /api/bd/dashboard includes agent_performance for super admin
Backend: GET /api/bd/dashboard?period=X supports all period filters (this_month, this_quarter, this_year, overall)
Backend: PUT /api/bd/students/{id}/stage updates BD stage successfully
Backend: PUT /api/bd/students/{id}/stage rejects invalid stages with 400
Backend: POST /api/bd/record-redeposit records redeposit and moves student to closed
Backend: POST /api/bd/students/{id}/reassign works for super admin
Backend: POST /api/bd/students/{id}/reassign returns 403 for BD agent (correct access control)
Backend: Unauthenticated access to BD endpoints returns 403
Frontend: BD CRM page renders at /bd with kanban columns (new_student, contacted, pitched, interested, closed)
Frontend: BD CRM shows 522 students for BD agent, 1044 for super admin
Frontend: BD CRM stat cards show counts for each stage
Frontend: BD CRM search input functional
Frontend: BD CRM student cards show name, phone, mentor, amount, BD agent badge
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows all student info
Frontend: BD CRM Record Redeposit modal with amount and date inputs
Frontend: BD Dashboard page renders at /bd/dashboard with KPIs
Frontend: BD Dashboard shows Total Students, Period Revenue, All-Time Revenue, Closed Deals
Frontend: BD Dashboard Pipeline Breakdown bar chart renders
Frontend: BD Dashboard Stage Distribution pie chart renders
Frontend: BD Dashboard Agent Performance table visible for super admin
Frontend: BD Dashboard Recent Redeposits table renders
Frontend: BD Dashboard period selector (This Month, This Quarter, This Year, Overall)
Frontend: BD Dashboard agent filter dropdown for super admin
Frontend: Sidebar shows BD CRM and BD Dashboard under Academics section for BD role
Frontend: Sidebar shows BD CRM and BD Dashboard for super admin
critical_code_review_comments: BD module implementation is complete and well-structured
Backend endpoints properly scope data: BD agents see only their students, super admin sees all
Frontend BDCRMPage.jsx uses dnd-kit for drag-and-drop kanban functionality
Frontend BDDashboardPage.jsx uses recharts for pipeline and stage distribution charts
MentorCRMPage.jsx includes BD agent badge on student cards (lines 183-187)
Access control properly enforced: reassignment restricted to super_admin/admin roles
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bd_module.py - New test file for BD module (18 tests)
seed_data_creation: None - BD students already assigned via round-robin (522 each to Rashida and Farsana)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BD module fully implemented and tested. Two BD agents (Rashida and Farsana) have 522 students each assigned via round-robin. All students start with bd_stage=new_student. BD CRM at /bd has drag-and-drop kanban with 5 stages. BD Dashboard at /bd/dashboard shows KPIs, charts, and agent performance. Super admin can view all 1044 BD students and reassign between agents. Mentor CRM cards show BD agent badge when student has bd_agent_name.
